changes.motivation: The existing memory allocations were insufficient for the nix image builder CI/CD workflows, requiring a doubling of resources.
changes.summary: Doubled memory requests and limits for all four containers in infrastructure/demo_cicd/nix_image_builder.tf: check-image (256Miâ†’512Mi), init-store (250Mi reqâ†’500Mi, 400Mi limitâ†’800Mi), main/build-and-push (8Giâ†’16Gi), and merge-and-copy (500Mi reqâ†’1000Mi, 750Mi limitâ†’1500Mi).
